name: Crockpot Grains
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Tomato Sauce, salt-free or regular (1 lb Tomatoes, canned, chopped - drained, reserve liquid)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all dry ingredients in the crockpot and set aside.
2. In the morning, add wet ingredients: tomato sauce (reserve liquid for later), chopped tomatoes, corn (drained), and water to equal 2 1/2 cups total.
3. Stir the mixture and cover.
4. Cook on low setting for 8 hours.
5. Before serving, stir the contents of the crockpot.
6. Serve as a side dish for 8 or a filling main course for 4-6 people.
Each serving contains approximately: 168 calories, 7g protein, 2g fat, 33g carbohydrates, and 177mg sodium.
